verdict.note: M4 defense-in-depth, LIVE on real AWS: a Bedrock Guardrail deployed via the M4 CDK guardrail-stack really intervened (GUARDRAIL_INTERVENED) on a tool-response containing a fake AWS access key and an sk- API token, masking both to {aws-access-key-id}/{generic-api-token} via custom regex policies. This is the 'every tool response passes a Guardrail' control proven end-to-end, not synth-only. Account id scrubbed.
